result.notes: Whisper large-v3 is an ASR model (WhisperForConditionalGeneration); audio INPUT models need media decoders (librosa, soundfile, ffmpeg) not bundled in the stock vLLM image. Bootstrap installs them at cold start before launching the vLLM server. Expect ~60s cold-start penalty.

cmd: pip install -q librosa soundfile && apt-get install -q -y ffmpeg 2>/dev/null; python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model openai/whisper-large-v3 --dtype auto
